category_title: Disciplined students performing as docile test-takers
scenario_title: Disruption of established physical testing routine by a peer
minimal_context: Bill is preparing to take the Scholastic Reading Inventory assessment in his third-grade classroom.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: It is time for the Scholastic Reading Inventory assessment. Everyone please take a seat so I can distribute the test booklets.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Returns from using the bathroom prior to the test) Someone moved their table to my spot while I was in the bathroom.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Please just find another empty table to sit at so we can get started.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Stands still and does not sit down) But that is my regular testing spot.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: We need to begin the assessment now. Just take the empty seat right over there.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: Can I sit at my regular spot? (Waits for the teacher to use their authority to move the peer, unable to adjust his table close to his body and sit silently until he has his claimed spot)

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: It is time for the Scholastic Reading Inventory assessment. Everyone please take a seat so I can distribute the test booklets.

STUDENT: (Returns from using the bathroom prior to the test) Someone moved their table to my spot while I was in the bathroom.

TUTOR: Please just find another empty table to sit at so we can get started.

STUDENT: (Stands still and does not sit down) But that is my regular testing spot.

TUTOR: We need to begin the assessment now. Just take the empty seat right over there.

STUDENT: Can I sit at my regular spot? (Waits for the teacher to use their authority to move the peer, unable to adjust his table close to his body and sit silently until he has his claimed spot)

task.content: Preparing for a Scholastic Reading Inventory (SRI) assessment

context.environment: A regular testing spot, which he claimed as his own

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: Another peer moved her table there, while Bill was using the bathroom
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: When he came back, he asked Ms. Cayenne if he could sit at his regular spot
challenging_behavior_trigger.internal_state: Recognized the teacher as the one with the authority to make decisions over who sits where

behavior_patterns.condition: Prior to the administration of the test
behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: Regulated his physical needs and used the bathroom... adjusted his table, pulling it closer to his body, sat still, and waited silently as the teachers distributed test booklets
behavior_patterns.internal_state: Subject to the institutional power... taking up the discourse of testing and thus reciting desirable and intelligible types of a reader identity
